tags.name: RDI Core
tags.description:
Data Integration (RDI) endpoints. Experimental - this surface is independent of the Cloud API and may change or break between minor releases.

RDI Core API version: 0.0.0

delete.description:
Replaces a pipeline with an empty inactive pipeline and resets it.

This is done to ensure that no artifacts (offsets, schema, data streams etc.) are left behind,
as this may cause errors and unexpected behavior when trying to re-create the pipeline.

get.description: Gets the status of a pipeline by name.

post.description: Starts a pipeline, retrying on 409 conflicts received from the K8s API server.
Stops a pipeline, retrying on 409 conflicts received from the K8s API server.
Resets a pipeline, retrying on 409 conflicts received from the K8s API server.

400.description: Bad Request

get.summary: Get all DLQ streams with counts
get.description: Returns all tables that have DLQ records with their total counts. Table names are returned in the format: source_name.schema_name.table_name (for PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQL Server, Spanner) or source_name.database_name.table_name (for MySQL, MariaDB, MongoDB).

parameters.name: full_table_name

schema.description: Full stream name in format: source_name.schema_name.table_name (e.g., 'postgres.public.users') or source_name.database_name.table_name (e.g., 'mysql.mydb.users')
schema.title: Full Table Name

parameters.description: Full stream name in format: source_name.schema_name.table_name (e.g., 'postgres.public.users') or source_name.database_name.table_name (e.g., 'mysql.mydb.users')

get.summary: Get DLQ info for a specific stream
get.description: Returns the DLQ count for a specific stream. The stream name must be in the format: source_name.schema_name.table_name (e.g., 'postgres.public.users') or source_name.database_name.table_name (e.g., 'mysql.mydb.users').

parameters.name: full_table_name

schema.description: Full stream name in format: source_name.schema_name.table_name (e.g., 'postgres.public.users') or source_name.database_name.table_name (e.g., 'mysql.mydb.users')
schema.title: Full Table Name

parameters.description: Full stream name in format: source_name.schema_name.table_name (e.g., 'postgres.public.users') or source_name.database_name.table_name (e.g., 'mysql.mydb.users')

get.summary: Get DLQ records for a specific stream
get.description: Returns the DLQ records for a specific table with pagination. The stream name must be in the format: source_name.schema_name.table_name (e.g., 'postgres.public.users') or source_name.database_name.table_name (e.g., 'mysql.mydb.users').

parameters.name: fields

schema.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in projection. Allowed fields: __dlq_stream_entry_id, db, opcode, reason_rejected, removed_fields, schema, server_name, source, source_type, table, timestamp
schema.title: Fields

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in projection. Allowed fields: __dlq_stream_entry_id, db, opcode, reason_rejected, removed_fields, schema, server_name, source, source_type, table, timestamp

400.description: Bad Request
